summary: Constructs system and user prompts for single-message summarization, embedding source type and channel name as context

observations.text: localModelPreamble is a package-level const appended to the system prompt only when WithLocalModel() is set on Service — it instructs local models to skip preamble and be maximally concise
BuildSingleMessagePrompt rejects empty message.Text but does not guard against very large texts — no truncation before sending to LLM; token limits are delegated entirely to the provider
User prompt embeds sourceType and channelName verbatim, giving the LLM explicit source provenance for better summarization framing
